## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change scoped to the affected implementation.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I ran all applicable checks and reported failures.
- [ ] I updated public API, setup, and release documentation.
- [ ] I did not commit dependencies, secrets, caches, local data, or build output.
- [ ] I considered backward compatibility and package contents.
- [ ] This pull request does not publicly disclose an unpatched vulnerability.
